description_long: This is a hand-crafted, medium-sized ceramic vase with a slightly flared rim and a rounded, tapering body. The surface is matte and uneven, showing visible marks of manual shaping and a rough, rustic finish. Around the midsection, there is a raised, twisted band that encircles the vase, adding a subtle decorative element. The coloration is predominantly dark gray with patches of brown and lighter gray, suggesting age and possible exposure to the elements. The vase appears to have some surface imperfections, including chips and cracks, indicating it has been used or weathered over time. Its interior is hollow, making it suitable for holding flowers or other items.
description: A rustic, hand-crafted ceramic vase with a flared rim, rough matte surface, and a twisted decorative band around its midsection. The vase is dark gray with brown patches and visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: This view highlights the flared rim, the twisted band around the middle, and visible chips and cracks on the lower half.
description_view_1: This side shows a smoother surface with fewer visible cracks, and the twisted band is clearly defined.
description_view_2: The vase appears more uniformly gray from this angle, with the twisted band still visible but less pronounced.
description_view_3: This view reveals more brown discoloration and surface wear, especially near the base and rim.
